items.key: (@@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

items.key: bp_ref like case when '{$%c[bp_ref]}' <> '' then '{$%c[bp_ref]}%' else '''' end and status = '1'
items.check: bp_ref like case when '{$%c[bp_ref]}' <> '' then '{$%c[bp_ref]}%' else '''' end

command.text: declare @ngay_ks varchar(8) select @ngay_ks = convert(varchar(8), ngay_ks, 112) from dmstt select 'this._lockedDate = ''' + @ngay_ks + ''';active$ShiftScheduleFilter(this);' as message return

declare @d varchar(512), @keyDept nvarchar(4000), @keyData nvarchar(4000) select @d = '' if exists(select 1 from dmstt where @nam >= year(ngay_gh1) and @nam <= year(ngay_gh2)) begin select top 0 ma_bp, ngay into #ngaynghi from hrdmngaynghi select @keyDept = 'bp_ref like ''' + replace(@bp_ref, '''', '') + '%''', @keyData = 'a.status = 1 and month(a.ngay) = ' + replace(ltrim(@thang), '''', '''''') + ' and year(a.ngay) = ' + replace(ltrim(@nam), '''', '''''') insert into #ngaynghi exec FastBusiness$HRM$DepartmentGetData @keyDept, 'hrdmngaynghi', 'ngay', @keyData, '', 0
select @d = @d + rtrim(day(ngay)) + ',' from #ngaynghi select @d = substring(@d, 0, len(@d)) end
select '' as field, '' as message, 'this.grid._nonWorking = ''' + @d + ''';remove$GridReport$Filter(this.grid);' as script return

action.text: declare @b varchar(128) select @b = '' if exists(select 1 from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp) select @b = bp_ref from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp select @b as value return
